EriAppHeader.note: BDS site uses its own PublicLayout header — exempt from standard header requirement

EriPageLayout.note: BDS site uses its own PublicLayout — exempt

EriHeroSection.note: BDS site has no hero section — exempt

EriAppFooter.note: BDS site uses its own footer — exempt

knownViolations: BDS site is the reference implementation and is exempt from standard layout requirements (EriPageLayout, EriAppHeader, EriAppFooter, EriHeroSection). It uses its own PublicLayout and custom header/footer to demonstrate all patterns.
